queries.question: Show all the network admin job postings, also show the IT consultant jobs with a $70k salary.
queries.sql:
SELECT JobPostings.title 
FROM JobPostings
WHERE JobPostings.itJobs = "Network Administrator" OR JobPostings.itJobs = "IT Consultant" AND JobPostings.salary = "$70,000"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?jobpostings a :JobPostings .
  ?jobpostings p:title ?title .
  ?jobpostings p:itJobs ?itjobs_w .
  ?jobpostings p:itJobs ?itjobs_w2 .
  ?jobpostings p:salary ?salary_w .
  FILTER((STR(?itjobs_w) = "Network Administrator" || (STR(?itjobs_w2) = "IT Consultant" && STR(?salary_w) = "$70,000")))
}

queries.question: Show network admin jobs and IT consultant jobs with a $70k salary.
queries.sql:
SELECT JobPostings.title 
FROM JobPostings
WHERE (JobPostings.itJobs = "Network Administrator" OR JobPostings.itJobs = "IT Consultant") AND JobPostings.salary = "$70,000"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?jobpostings a :JobPostings .
  ?jobpostings p:title ?title .
  ?jobpostings p:itJobs ?itjobs_w .
  ?jobpostings p:itJobs ?itjobs_w2 .
  ?jobpostings p:salary ?salary_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?itjobs_w) = "Network Administrator" || STR(?itjobs_w2) = "IT Consultant")) && STR(?salary_w) = "$70,000"))
}
